# fly_certificate (Resource)

Manages a TLS certificate for a Fly.io application. Import using app_name/hostname: `terraform import fly_certificate.example my-app/example.com`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_app" "example" {
  name     = "my-cert-app"
  org_slug = "personal"
}

resource "fly_certificate" "example" {
  app      = fly_app.example.name
  hostname = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the application to add the certificate to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname for the certificate. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

### Read-Only

- `certificate_authority` (String) The certificate authority that issued the certificate.
- `check_status` (String) The validation check status of the certificate.
- `dns_validation_hostname` (String) The hostname to use for DNS validation.
- `dns_validation_target` (String) The target to use for DNS validation.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the certificate.
- `issued_at` (String) The timestamp when the certificate was issued.
- `source` (String) The source of the certificate.
